productDisplayName: Basics Men Blue Slim Fit Striped Shirt
description: CompositionLight blue full sleeved shirt, made of 100% cotton, that has white and grey narrow stripes, a mock V-shaped yoke in the same fabric as the shirt, a tipped collar with buttons and a full front buttoned placket, a chest pocket on the left, full sleeves, and has a curved hemFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroideryStripes that add immense attitude to your wardrobe is what basics brings into your life. The full sleeves are sure to keep the winter chill at bay, and you can roll them up to suit your style. Team this shirt with jeans and sports shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
